final:
module RefModule(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire [7:0] temperature,  
    output reg shutdown_signal  
);  

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            shutdown_signal <= 0;  
        end else if (temperature > 8'd75) begin  
            shutdown_signal <= 1;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
